message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

class "BeanDefinition" <<interface>> { }
abstract class AbstractBeanDefinition {}
class RootBeanDefinition #7FFFD4{ }
class ChildBeanDefinition #7FFFD4{}
class AnnotatedBeanDefinition<<I>> { }
class GenericBeanDefinition#C0C0C0 { }
note top of BeanDefinition 
背景颜色介绍：  
红色 :非常重要 #FF5000   
绿色 :重点关注 #7FFFD4    
黄色 :可一般关注     
灰色 :弃用 #C0C0C0      
BeanDefinition : xml或注解定义的bean内存表示       
end note


RootBeanDefinition --|>AbstractBeanDefinition 

ChildBeanDefinition--|>AbstractBeanDefinition 


AnnotatedGenericBeanDefinition -[dashed]->AnnotatedBeanDefinition
ScannedGenericBeanDefinition-[dashed]-->AnnotatedBeanDefinition



ConfigurationClassBeanDefinition -->RootBeanDefinition
ConfigurationClassBeanDefinition ..>AnnotatedBeanDefinition




' ScannedGenericBeanDefinition ->GenericBeanDefinition
'ScannerGenericBeanDefinition->AnnotatedBeanDefinition
AnnotatedGenericBeanDefinition-|>GenericBeanDefinition
AnnotatedGenericBeanDefinition..>AnnotatedBeanDefinition
@enduml
